subject: Gold removal in the Warp workflow
body:
Hi all,

I want to ask your experience in fiducial removal in the Warp workflow. 

I tried Fidder. I found that the predicted mask by Fidder using probability 
from 0.5 to 0.9 contains a lot of stuffs, not only fiducial but also ice 
contamination and sometimes proteins in the background. 

Is there anyway that I can limit Fidder to only very high contrast gold 
fiducials? Also, does the fiddle mask contain so many things such as ice 
contaminations affecting subtomogram averaging later on at all?

Best regards,
Huy
